question.prompt: On a 1-7 scale, how likely is the tower to fall when unfrozen?

metrics.name: duplicate_bbox_frame_pairs
metrics.comparison_target: pairwise IoU <= 0.85 for distinct object IDs

metrics.name: primary_source_failure_count
metrics.comparison_target: mask and bbox source must be sam3.1-real

metrics.name: symbolic_center_2d_error_px
metrics.reason: source symbolic metadata does not expose frame-aligned 2D trajectories

metrics.name: symbolic_relation_event_agreement
metrics.reason: source symbolic metadata has no explicit relation/event labels

metrics.name: mean_3d_reprojection_iou
metrics.comparison_target: projected oriented bbox versus SAM region

metrics.name: camera_roundtrip_error_px
metrics.reason: camera round-trip value is absent from accepted diagnostics

metrics.name: minimum_lifted_mask_point_support
metrics.comparison_target: at least 50 valid lifted SAM-mask pixels
